description_long: This is a round wall clock with a significant portion missing, as if a large bite has been taken out of its side. The clock face is white with bold black Roman numerals marking the hours, and it features two black hands indicating the time. The rim of the clock is a dark brown color, giving it a distinct border that contrasts with the white face. The missing section exposes the inner structure, which appears to be solid and consistent with the rest of the clock's body. The clock is relatively thin, as seen from the side views, and has a matte finish with a slightly rough texture. Its whimsical, damaged appearance makes it a striking and unconventional decorative piece.
description: A round wall clock with a white face, black Roman numerals, and a dark brown rim, featuring a large missing section as if bitten. The clock has a matte, slightly rough finish and a playful, damaged design.
description_view_0: The front view shows the white clock face with black Roman numerals, two black hands, and a large missing section on the right side.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the clock's thin profile and the dark brown rim, with the missing section visible as a jagged edge.
description_view_2: The back view displays the solid brown back and the large missing section, with no numerals or hands visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the clock's thinness and the continuous brown rim, with the missing section on the left.
attribute_face_design: Round white face with black Roman numerals and a large missing section, bordered by a dark brown rim.
